pre_game.message: Hey there, I'm C. Thought I'd say hello before things get too competitive in here—how are you holding up with the wait?
Hey C, I'm G. Hanging in there, just ready to get the show on the road. You feeling nervous at all?
A little bit, yeah—hard not to be when there's so much on the line. I'm mostly just trying to stay focused. How about you?
Same here. I’ve got people counting on me back home, so I’m just trying to keep my head in the game and stay sharp.
I totally get that. I'm in the same boat—doing this for my family too. It definitely makes the stakes feel a lot higher.
It definitely does. It’s good to know I’m not the only one with that kind of pressure. What’s the first thing you’d do for them if you win?
Honestly, I’d pay off my parents’ mortgage first—they’ve worked so hard, and I want them to finally have some peace. What about you?
That’s a great goal. I’d clear some debt for my family first and then set up a fund for my brother’s education so he has a real head start.
That’s really selfless. Education is such a huge gift to give someone; your brother is lucky to have you looking out for him.
Thanks, C. I really appreciate that. He's a good kid, and I just want to give him a shot he wouldn't have otherwise. Anyway, I should probably mingle a bit more before we start. Best of luck to you!
I totally understand. Best of luck to you too, G—I really hope you can make that happen for your brother.

post_game.message: Great job! I'm glad we all stuck to the fair share.
It was a pleasure working with you! I'm glad we reached such a fair and successful outcome.
